basic_details.job_title: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Delhi only)

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.deep_chand_bandhu_hospital: Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB, Diploma) in the concerned disciplines

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB, Diploma) in the concerned disciplines.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Delhi only)

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital is scheduled for 09 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital?
faq.answer: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital has announced a total of 10 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts. These vacancies are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB, Diploma) in the concerned disciplines. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. This includes ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments have vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available for Senior Residents in Medicine (4 posts), OBG (3 posts), Surgery (1 post), Radiology (1 post), and Paeds (1 post).

faq.question: Q10. Where is Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital located?
faq.answer: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital is located in Delhi, with a pincode of 110052. The exact venue for the walk-in interview will be specified in the official notification.
